companySlogan: Drive progress in every process
companyDescription:
Conduent delivers digital business solutions and services spanning the commercial, government and transportation spectrum – creating valuable outcomes for its clients and the millions of people who count on them. We leverage cloud computing, artificial intelligence, machine learning, automation and advanced analytics to deliver mission-critical solutions. Through a dedicated global team of approximately 55,000 associates, process expertise and advanced technologies, our solutions and services digitally transform our clients’ operations to enhance customer experiences, improve performance, increase efficiencies and reduce costs. We drive progress in every process for our client including disbursing approximately $100 billion in government payments annually, enabling 2.3 billion customer service interactions annually, empowering millions of employees through HR services every year and processing nearly 13 million tolling transactions every day. 

Learn more at www.conduent.com

title: Systems Analyst
descriptionHtml:
About Xerox Holdings Corporation

For more than 100 years, Xerox has continually redefined the workplace experience. Harnessing our leadership position in office and production print technology, we’ve expanded into software and services to sustainably power the hybrid workplace of today and tomorrow. Today, Xerox is continuing its legacy of innovation to deliver client-centric and digitally-driven technology solutions and meet the needs of today’s global, distributed workforce. From the office to industrial environments, our differentiated business and technology offerings and financial services are essential workplace technology solutions that drive success for our clients. At Xerox, we make work, work. Learn more about us at www.xerox.com.

Purpose:

  • Responsible for analyzing customer requirements and the analysis of information/data. Manages projects if required. Provides input to improve overall efficiency and processes.
  • The role holder under moderate supervision of the Senior Business Systems Analyst is responsible for understanding the business needs and identifying how best to meet those needs. This includes working with the business and the technology areas to gather requirements for development and management. The role analyzes, validates and documents the business and system requirements.
  • This role designs, modifies and creates business processes that will be used to implement the business transformation solutions. This is done through research and fact-finding combined with a basic understanding of applicable business processes, systems, and industry requirements.
  • The role holder adheres to the established processes and requirements management methodology and practices, while carrying out their responsibilities. This includes meeting established quality standards.

Scope:

Specific:

  • Single business process, or sub-process, within a specific geographic region and/or business unit.
  • Autonomy:

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or Information Systems is required.

  • Works under broad direction.
  • Full accountability for own technical work or project/supervisory responsibilities.
  • Receives assignments in the form of objectives.
  • Establishes own milestones, team objectives and delegates assignments.
  • Work is often self-initiated.
  • Influence:
  • Influences organization, customers, suppliers and peers within industry in area of specialization.
  • Significant responsibility for the work of others and for the allocation of resources.
  • Decisions impact on success of assigned projects i.e. results, deadlines and budget.
  • Develops business relationships with customers.
  • Complexity:
  • Challenging range variety of complex technical or professional work activities.
  • Work requires application of fundamental principles in a wide and often unpredictable range of contexts.
  • Understands relationship between specialism and wider customer/ organizational requirements.

General:

  • Uses best practices and knowledge of internal or external business issues to improve products or services
  • Acts as a resource for colleagues with less experience
  • Requires in-depth knowledge and experience
  • Decisions guided by policies, procedures and business plan
  • Generally domestic scope/accountability

Primary Responsibilities:

  • Investigates operational requirements and problems, seeking effective business solutions through improvements in automated and non-automated components of new or changed business processes.
  • Assists in the analysis of the underlying issues arising from investigations into requirements and problems and identifies available options for consideration.
  • Works with clients/users in defining acceptance tests. Specifies and develops test scenarios to test that new/redesigned processes deliver improved ways of working for the end user at the same time as delivering efficiencies and planned business benefits. Records and reports test results. Uses test plans and outcomes to specify user instructions.
  • Key Tasks:
  • Works with colleagues and clients/users to investigate and model business functions, processes, information flows and data structures, using methodical and consistent techniques.
  • Works with colleagues and clients/users to investigate operational requirements and problems, seeking effective business solutions through improvements in automated and non-automated components of new or changed processes/procedures, organization and equipment. Assists in the analysis of the underlying issues arising from investigations into requirements and problems, and identifies available options for consideration.
  • Works with colleagues and clients/users in specifying information flows, processes/procedures, and data objects that will meet the business requirements.
  • Documents all work using the required standards, methods and tools.
  • Arranges, prepares and takes part in client/users meetings and presents issues and solutions both orally and in writing.
  • Assists clients/users in defining acceptance tests for automated systems, in a thorough and reliable manner.
  • Assists in defining, planning and justifying (in business terms) projects to develop/implement automated and non-automated components of new or changed processes.
  • Working with users, reviews proposed benefits and risks in the new/redesigned processes, confirms the acceptance criteria for these processes, and ensures that they are properly documented in the business justification.
  • Specifies and develops test scenarios to test that new/redesigned processes deliver improved ways of working for the end user at the same time as delivering efficiencies and planned business benefits.
  • Records and reports test results. Uses test plans and outcomes to specify user instructions.

-  Decisions impact on success of assigned projects i.e. results, deadlines and budget.
-  Develops business relationships with customers.
-  Complexity:
-  Challenging range variety of complex technical or professional work activities.
-  Work requires application of fundamental principles in a wide and often unpredictable range of contexts.
-  Understands relationship between specialism and wider customer/ organizational requirements.

General:



-  Uses best practices and knowledge of internal or external business issues to improve products or services
-  Acts as a resource for colleagues with less experience
-  Requires in-depth knowledge and experience
-  Decisions guided by policies, procedures and business plan
-  Generally domestic scope/accountability

Primary Responsibilities:



-  Investigates operational requirements and problems, seeking effective business solutions through improvements in automated and non-automated components of new or changed business processes.
-  Assists in the analysis of the underlying issues arising from investigations into requirements and problems and identifies available options for consideration.
-  Works with clients/users in defining acceptance tests. Specifies and develops test scenarios to test that new/redesigned processes deliver improved ways of working for the end user at the same time as delivering efficiencies and planned business benefits. Records and reports test results. Uses test plans and outcomes to specify user instructions.
-  Key Tasks:
-  Works with colleagues and clients/users to investigate and model business functions, processes, information flows and data structures, using methodical and consistent techniques.
-  Works with colleagues and clients/users to investigate operational requirements and problems, seeking effective business solutions through improvements in automated and non-automated components of new or changed processes/procedures, organization and equipment. Assists in the analysis of the underlying issues arising from investigations into requirements and problems, and identifies available options for consideration.
-  Works with colleagues and clients/users in specifying information flows, processes/procedures, and data objects that will meet the business requirements.
-  Documents all work using the required standards, methods and tools.
-  Arranges, prepares and takes part in client/users meetings and presents issues and solutions both orally and in writing.
-  Assists clients/users in defining acceptance tests for automated systems, in a thorough and reliable manner.
-  Assists in defining, planning and justifying (in business terms) projects to develop/implement automated and non-automated components of new or changed processes.
-  Working with users, reviews proposed benefits and risks in the new/redesigned processes, confirms the acceptance criteria for these processes, and ensures that they are properly documented in the business justification.
-  Specifies and develops test scenarios to test that new/redesigned processes deliver improved ways of working for the end user at the same time as delivering efficiencies and planned business benefits.
-  Records and reports test results. Uses test plans and outcomes to specify user instructions.

companyDescription:
Xerox has been redefining the workplace experience for over a century. 

As a services-led, software-enabled company, we power today’s hybrid workplace through advanced print, digital, and AI-driven technologies. In 2025, Xerox acquired Lexmark—expanding our global footprint, strengthening service capabilities, and equipping us to deliver an even broader portfolio of workplace technologies to our clients. Today, we continue our legacy of innovation to deliver client-centric, digitally driven solutions that meet the needs of a global, distributed workforce. Whether in offices, classrooms, or hospitals, we help our clients thrive in a constantly evolving business landscape.

title: Senior Business Analyst
descriptionHtml:
Job Title: Senior Business Analyst

Location: Trivandrum

Experience Range: 6+ yrs

Type: Full-Time


Responsibilities;

• Requirements Analysis

• Elicit requirements, document user stories, create functional specifications

• Sprint Management

• Maintain sprint backlogs, facilitate planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives

• Dependency Tracking

• Create cross-project dependency matrix; proactively flag risks and blockers

• Vendor Liaison

• Consolidate vendor questions, track deliverables, ensure SoW alignment

• Documentation Delivery

• Produce BRDs, HLDs, test plans, deployment guides, and training materials

• UAT Coordination

• Plan UAT exercises, create test scripts, manage defect triage and resolution


Qualifications and Experience;

• Certified Scrum Master (CSM / PSM) with 3–5 years of experience in IT project delivery

• Strong business analysis skills — requirements elicitation, user story writing, process mapping, UAT planning

• Hands-on experience with Microsoft ecosystem (Azure DevOps, SharePoint, Teams, Intune, M365)

• Familiarity with infrastructure and cloud migration projects

• Experience with document management systems is a plus

• Ability to work effectively across multiple time zones (MENA, Pacific, US, Asia)

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• Strong stakeholder management and facilitation abilities


Recommended key competencies;

• Agile & Scrum

• Sprint planning, backlog management, ceremonies facilitation, impediment removal

• Business Analysis

• Requirements elicitation, user stories, process mapping, gap analysis

• Documentation

• BRDs, HLDs, test plans, deployment guides, governance artifacts, MoMs

• Stakeholder Management

• Cross-functional coordination, vendor liaison, executive communication

• Tools & Platforms

• Azure DevOps, SharePoint, Teams, Intune, M365, Power Platform (preferred

title: Business Systems Analyst SCM
descriptionHtml:
Job Description

In this Role, Your Responsibilities Will Be:

Techno Functional Knowledge on Oracle Functional areas related to Quote & Order Management, Advanced Pricing, Procurement, Manufacturing systems

Must have hands-on development experience in most of Oracle development tool set – including PL/SQL, Oracle Reports, XML Publisher Reports, Workflow, OAF, Concurrent Programs.

Experience in building REST APIs, scripting languages-Python, XML and JSON message formats.

We require you to have experience in systems analysis, gathering user requirements and understanding and interpreting requirements Specifications.

We require individual having strong analytical and problem-solving skills; validated history of successful problem solving.

You should have experience in a version control system and code deployment systems.

We look for person who is motivated and proficient to contribute time and effort to work assigned.

We need your ability to work optimally in a multi-cultural, team-oriented, collaborative environment.

Who You Are:

You show a tremendous amount of initiative in tough situations; are exceptional at spotting and seizing opportunities. You observe situational and group dynamics and select best-fit approach. You make implementation plans that allocate resources precisely. You pursue everything with energy, drive, and the need to finish.

For This Role, You Will Need:

  • Must have 8+ years of experience in SCM Development / Implementation & Support projects.
  • Good to have knowledge of Quote, Order Management, Advanced Pricing, Procurement and Manufacturing functional processes
  • Must have hands-on development experience in most of Oracle development tool set – including PL/SQL, Oracle Reports, XML Publisher Reports, Workflow, OAF, Concurrent Programs.
  • We need experience in building REST APIs, scripting languages-Python, XML and JSON message formats. (some years of experience may be compensated with professional qualifications).

Preferred Qualifications that Set You Apart:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, or an equivalent work experience.
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills

Our Culture & Commitment to You

At Emerson, we prioritize a workplace where every employee is valued, respected, and empowered to grow. We foster an environment that encourages innovation, collaboration, and diverse perspectives—because we know that great ideas come from great teams. Our commitment to ongoing career development and growing an inclusive culture ensures you have the support to thrive. Whether through mentorship, training, or leadership opportunities, we invest in your success so you can make a lasting impact. We believe diverse teams, working together are key to driving growth and delivering business results.

We recognize the importance of employee wellbeing. We prioritize providing competitive benefits plans, a variety of medical insurance plans, Employee Assistance Program, employee resource groups, recognition, and much more. Our culture offers flexible time off plans, including paid parental leave (maternal and paternal), vacation and holiday leave.

About Us

WHY EMERSON

Our Commitment to Our People

At Emerson, we are motivated by a spirit of collaboration that helps our diverse, multicultural teams across the world drive innovation that makes the world healthier, safer, smarter, and more sustainable. And we want you to join us in our bold aspiration.

We have built an engaged community of inquisitive, dedicated people who thrive knowing they are welcomed, trusted, celebrated, and empowered to solve the world’s most complex problems — for our customers, our communities, and the planet. You’ll contribute to this vital work while further developing your skills through our award-winning employee development programs. We are a proud corporate citizen in every city where we operate and are committed to our people, our communities, and the world at large. We take this responsibility seriously and strive to make a positive impact through every endeavor.

At Emerson, you’ll see firsthand that our people are at the center of everything we do. So, let’s go. Let’s think differently. Learn, collaborate, and grow. Seek opportunity. Push boundaries. Be empowered to make things better. Speed up to break through. Let’s go, together.

Accessibility Assistance or Accommodation

If you have a disability and are having difficulty accessing or using this website to apply for a position, please contact: idisability.administrator@emerson.com .

About Emerson

Emerson is a global leader in automation technology and software. Through our deep domain expertise and legacy of flawless execution, Emerson helps customers in critical industries like life sciences, energy, power and renewables, chemical and advanced factory automation operate more sustainably while improving productivity, energy security and reliability.

With global operations and a comprehensive portfolio of software and technology, we are helping companies implement digital transformation to measurably improve their operations, conserve valuable resources and enhance their safety.

We offer equitable opportunities, celebrate diversity, and embrace challenges with confidence that, together, we can make an impact across a broad spectrum of countries and industries. Whether you’re an established professional looking for a career change, an undergraduate student exploring possibilities, or a recent graduate with an advanced degree, you’ll find your chance to make a difference with Emerson. Join our team – let’s go!

No calls or agencies please.

title: Digital & System Admin – Procurement & REWS
descriptionHtml:
WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands.

We unite cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel in a single company – powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open, to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth.

We have been building the world's most valuable brands for 50 years and have global reach across 100+ markets, with deep local expertise.

Our people are the key to our success. We're committed to fostering a culture of creativity, belonging and continuous learning, attracting and developing the brightest talent, and providing exciting career opportunities that help our people grow.

For more information, visit WPP.com.

Why we're hiring:

We are seeking a business-oriented Digital Analyst to join our Global Centre of Excellence (COE) in Mumbai. This role will play a critical part in enabling digital first decision making across across Global Procurement and Real Estate & Workplace Solutions (REWS).

The analyst will act as a digital partner for both functions – Primarily focussed on Procurement where the resource will act as a product owner for Current Source to Contract solution for WPP Procurement (GEP) and also for any future tools. The resource will also be responsible for all

This is a hands-on role requiring strong analytical capability, stakeholder engagement, and the ability to translate complex datasets into clear, actionable insights for senior leadership.

What you'll be doing:

Digital & System Support – Procurement

  • Support the Global Director in managing the Procurement digital roadmap, including enhancements, automation opportunities, and future solution design.
  • Serve as a super user and operational support lead for Procurement platforms and tools such as GEP, SupplierIO, Databricks, Power BI, PowerApps, SharePoint, and advanced analytics solutions.
  • Assist in the design, testing, rollout, and adoption of source-to-contract and supplier-related systems.
  • Maintain and improve Procurement system processes, including user access, onboarding/offboarding, templates, and compliance with internal policies and quality standards.
  • Monitor system performance, identify issues, and coordinate resolution with internal and external technology partners.
  • Support the development and maintenance of Procurement portals, dashboards, and reporting tools to improve visibility of supplier, spend, and performance data.
  • Help identify opportunities for automation, AI-enabled workflows, and smarter ways of working.

Digital & Systems Support – REWS

  • Support the onboarding, adoption, and ongoing management of REWS systems and tools.
  • Act as a super user for platforms such as JLL Azara, Tango Analytics, CoStar, and other relevant REWS applications.
  • Conduct analysis to understand business needs, identify gaps, and support solution enhancements.
  • Partner with stakeholders to ensure tools and systems are effectively used to support workplace and real estate decisions.

Analytics, Governance & Reporting

  • Provide analysis, reporting, and insights to support the Global Director and leadership teams in making informed decisions.
  • Track and report key metrics such as:
  • user adoption
  • compliance
  • issue resolution
  • stakeholder feedback
  • training effectiveness
  • Review data quality, identify inconsistencies, and work with relevant teams to resolve issues.
  • Support governance processes and ensure systems operate in line with company controls and procedures.
  • Manage the shared inbox to support all digital & system related queries,

Stakeholder Engagement & COE Enablement

  • Work closely with global stakeholders across Procurement, REWS, Finance, IT, Data, and external vendors.
  • Act as a coordination point between business teams and technology partners to ensure priorities are understood and delivered.
  • Support the creation of standard processes, documentation, user guides, and best-practice materials to strengthen COE capability.
  • Communicate updates clearly and regularly to stakeholders, ensuring visibility of system changes, enhancements, and support issues.
  • Hold external suppliers accountable for timely resolution of queries and delivery commitments.

Who you'll be working with:

  • Direct support to a Global Director and exposure to senior decision-making.
  • Opportunity to influence digital transformation across two global functions.
  • High visibility role with meaningful impact on systems, analytics, and process improvement.
  • Chance to help shape the future of Procurement and REWS digital capabilities.

What you'll need:

Experience

  • 5–8+ years of experience business intelligence, reporting, systems support, and digital transformation.
  • Prior experience supporting Procurement, Supply Chain, REWS, Finance, or transformation teams is highly desirable.
  • Experience working with global stakeholders and complex datasets in a matrix environment.
  • Exposure to system implementation, process improvement, or digital transformation programs is an advantage.

Technical Skills

  • Strong understanding of Procurement systems and digital workflows.
  • Ability to interpret business requirements and support solution development.
  • Strong data review and validation skills, with the ability to identify issues and inconsistencies.
  • Comfortable learning new systems quickly and adapting to changing business needs.
  • Solid understanding of:
  • Procurement digital landscape
  • ERP and source-to-contract processes
  • Basic financial concepts such as GLs, cost centres, and budgets
  • REWS or portfolio-related metrics, where applicable

Soft Skills

  • Strong communication skills, with the ability to explain technical information in a clear and business-friendly way.
  • Excellent stakeholder management and collaboration skills.
  • Highly organized, with the ability to prioritize and manage multiple requests effectively.
  • Proactive, curious, and solutions oriented.
  • Strong sense of ownership and accountability.
  • Comfortable working in a global, fast-moving, and highly visible environment.

Who you are:

You're open: We are inclusive and collaborative; we encourage the free exchange of ideas; we respect and celebrate diverse views. We are open-minded: to new ideas, new partnerships, new ways of working.

You're optimistic: We believe in the power of creativity, technology and talent to create brighter futures or our people, our clients and our communities. We approach all that we do with conviction: to try the new and to seek the unexpected.

You're extraordinary: we are stronger together: through collaboration we achieve the amazing. We are creative leaders and pioneers of our industry; we provide extraordinary every day.

What we'll give you:

Passionate, inspired people – We aim to create a culture in which people can do extraordinary work.

Scale and opportunity – We offer the opportunity to create, influence and complete projects at a scale that is unparalleled in the industry.

Challenging and stimulating work – Unique work and the opportunity to join a group of creative problem solvers. Are you up for the challenge?

We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach, with teams in the office around four days a week. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.

WPP is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.

Please read our Privacy Notice (https://www.wpp.com/en/careers/wpp-privacy-policy-for-recruitment) for more information on how we process the information you provide.

Please read our Privacy Notice (https://www.wpp.com/en/careers/wpp-privacy-policy-for-recruitment) for more information on how we process the information you provide.

title: Business Analyst
descriptionHtml:
Job Summary

 JOB DESCRIPTION

The Application Support Team in FCEC has traditionally been responsible for the development & support of Flow Controls’ CPQ (Configure Price Quote) applications – FF2, FSM, PQT and Presto. Application Engineers and Emerson Impact Partners around the world use these applications to Size, Select, Quote, and Order Fisher and Regulator products. While this team still supports these critical applications, our focus has changed to creating next generation applications.

By joining this team, you will be effectively contributing to the development of Presto (our Next Generation CPQ cloud tool) and Phoenix (our overall digital transformation program). As this implies, you will be a part of a highly visible, essential, and innovative team that will lead our business into the future. You will play a key role in the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), working with modern tools such as Microsoft Azure & DevOps. Agile software development methodologies, such as Scrum and Kanban, will be a part of your daily work as you collaborate with teams around the world.

In This Role, Your Responsibilities Will Be to:

  • Work with stakeholders to learn business requirements and turn business needs into clear functional and technical specifications
  • Act as a bridge between business users and technical teams, ensuring alignment of requirements and deliverables.
  • Create and track work items in DevOps board with appropriate Acceptance Criteria and Repro Steps
  • Create and review test cases and test plans for the projects which are in development phase.
  • Maintain and prioritize product backlogs in collaboration with Product Owner
  • Participate in Scrum ceremonies (daily stand-ups, sprint planning, retrospectives)
  • Troubleshoot production issues reported by users and provide solutions
  • Perform regular product related data and code moves into the application without any issues.
  • Educate world area users and provide technical support for queries on everything related to the application.

Who You Are:

You promote high visibility of shared contributions towards the set goals. You quickly and significantly act in a constantly evolving unexpected situations. You actively seek input from pertinent sources to make timely and well-informed decisions. You handle the risk that comes with moving forward when the outcome is not certain.

Preferred Qualifications that Set You Apart:

  • Degree in any of the STEM courses
  • 2 to 5 years’ experience in any FCV team with working knowledge of FF2/PQT and ERP systems
  • Sound knowledge of business concepts, practices, and procedures
  • Strong time management and project management skills
  • High learning agility, good interpersonal savvy, and collaboration skills are required for working across regions and functions in Fisher.
  • Fluency in spoken and written English with good presentation skills
  • Basic SQL Knowledge is preferred, but not required.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Our Culture & Commitment to You

At Emerson, we prioritize a workplace where every employee is valued, respected, and empowered to grow. We foster an environment that encourages innovation, collaboration, and diverse perspectives—because we know that great ideas come from great teams. Our commitment to ongoing career development and growing an inclusive culture ensures you have the support to thrive. Whether through mentorship, training, or leadership opportunities, we invest in your success so you can make a lasting impact. We believe diverse teams, working together are key to driving growth and delivering business results.

We recognize the importance of employee wellbeing. We prioritize providing competitive benefits plans, a variety of medical insurance plans, Employee Assistance Program, employee resource groups, recognition, and much more. Our culture offers flexible time off plans, including paid parental leave (maternal and paternal), vacation and holiday leave.

title: Senior Project Manager - Tieto Caretech (m/f/d)
descriptionHtml:
Job Description

At Tieto Caretech you’ll get a chance to provide patients and end users with product offerings that help them in their life, reinventing the world for good. If that sounds interesting, please keep on reading.

About Us

Tieto Caretech is modernizing the Nordic health and social care sector with modular, open, and interoperable software. We develop and deliver high quality software solutions and services that enable healthcare and welfare professionals to do their work even better and with higher efficiency - have more time to care.

We are a global team of professionals working on providing products and services to different sectors from intensive care to laboratory and social care. In addition to working closely with our customers, we also have our own products that we build and develop for various fields in society. From enabling healthcare professionals to spend more valuable time with their patients to providing data for professional athletes to achieve even better results, we make all that possible. With us you can build technology for the good of society and make your mark on the health and wellbeing of people in need.

About The Role

We are actively seeking a Senior Project Manager with 12 to 20 years of experience only, including 4+ years as a Scrum Master. The person is responsible to lead end-to-end delivery of software development initiatives. The role involves managing cross-functional teams, engaging with global stakeholders, and ensuring successful execution of projects within scope, timeline, budget, and quality parameters.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead end-to-end project delivery across multiple software development initiatives.
  • Collaborate with business stakeholders to drive requirements gathering and define project scope, objectives, and success criteria.
  • Develop and manage comprehensive project plans, including timelines, resource allocation, and risk mitigation strategies.
  • Drive execution across Agile (Scrum/Kanban) and hybrid delivery models, ensuring adaptability to evolving project needs.
  • Manage cross-functional Scrum teams (development, QA, architects, Scrum Masters) remote, and hybrid setups.
  • Establish and enhance strong governance frameworks, including regular status reporting, stakeholder communication, and executive reviews.
  • Proactively manage risks, issues, and escalations, ensuring timely resolution and high customer satisfaction.
  • Ensure adherence to quality standards, SDLC processes, and delivery best practices.
  • Drive continuous improvement initiatives in delivery efficiency, team productivity, and process optimization.
  • Drive AI initiatives as per the organization guidelines

Core Competencies

  • Project Planning & Execution
  • Stakeholder Management
  • Risk & Issue Management
  • Change & Scope Management
  • Resource & Capacity Management
  • Quality Assurance & Governance
  • Agile Delivery & Transformation

Required Skills & Experience

  • Strong experience in software development lifecycle (SDLC) and managing development & testing projects.
  • Proven track record of delivering small to large-scale projects in Agile environments.
  • Hands-on experience with project management tools (e.g., Jira, MS Project, Azure DevOps, etc.).
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to engage senior leadership and clients.
  • Demonstrated ability to manage client-facing roles and build long-term relationships.
  • Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to operate in a fast-paced, multi-project environment.
  • Ability to lead, mentor, and motivate teams while fostering a collaborative culture.

Education & Certifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in engineering or equivalent.
  • Strong understanding of Agile/Scrum frameworks; Scrum certifications are a plus.
  • PMP / PRINCE2 certification preferred.

Additional Expectations

  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  • High degree of ownership, accountability, and adaptability.
  • Flexibility to take on new initiatives and support organizational growth.

What’s in it for you?

In addition, as a company we offer you professional growth, open and friendly culture. We believe that our organizational culture is an important part of enabling you to be successful. We provide a flexible hybrid work model as part of our culture and way of working.

Finally, we also believe in curiosity and learning as a lifestyle. We want to encourage you to keep up that curiosity and deepen your knowledge on topics you’re interested in.

Could you be our new colleague?

We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the Recruiter -Pooja Mishra [pooja.mishra@tieto.com]

Tieto creates purposeful technology that reinvents the world for good. We are a leading technology company with a strong Nordic heritage and global capabilities. Based on our core values of openness, trust and diversity, we work with our customers to develop digital futures where businesses, societies, and humanity thrive.

Our 24,000 experts globally specialize in cloud, data, and software, serving thousands of enterprises and public-sector customers in more than 90 countries. Tieto’s annual turnover is approximately EUR 3 billion, and the company’s shares are listed on the NASDAQ exchange in Helsinki and Stockholm, as well as on Oslo Børs.

Additional Information

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.

Diversity, equity and inclusion | Sustainability | Tieto

title: Technical Program Manager
descriptionHtml:
Job Summary: Priority is seeking a highly skilled Technical Program Manager to lead and manage individual technical projects that are large, complex, and span multiple teams and systems. This role requires deep technical acumen, an understanding of complex system integrations, and the ability to drive projects that deliver measurable business outcomes. The ideal candidate will seamlessly bridge technical and non-technical teams, ensuring alignment on deliverables while fostering innovation and operational excellence.

Responsibilities:

Project Delivery: Plan, execute, and deliver individual technical projects, ensuring they are completed on time, within scope, and on budget. You will define project objectives, milestones, and deliverables in collaboration with cross-functional teams and ensure alignment with broader program and organizational goals

.Stakeholder Communication: Facilitate effective and clear communication between project teams and stakeholders. You'll be responsible for keeping all parties informed and aligned on project progress, risks, and opportunities

.Risk & Issue Management: Proactively identify and monitor potential project risks and issues. You will be responsible for developing and implementing mitigation strategies to ensure timely resolution and smooth project progression

.Tool & Data Management: Utilize project management tools such as Jira and Confluence to manage project data, track progress, and support data-driven decision-making. You will also develop and maintain essential project documentation, including schedules, status reports, and post-mortems

.Compliance & Quality Assurance: Ensure all projects meet established quality standards and adhere to PMO governance processes


Your Impact:

Project Delivery: Your ability to deliver projects on time and within scope will directly contribute to the company’s success.

Stakeholder Collaboration: You will build trust and enhance communication, ensuring high levels of stakeholder satisfaction.

Operational Improvement: By implementing structured processes, you will drive efficiency and consistency across all technical projects.

Technical Alignment: Your work will support the broader program team by ensuring individual project success aligns with organizational objectives.


Minimum Requirements :

Experience: 5+ years of experience in technical project management, preferably in the technology or financial services sectors.

Education: A bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Project Management, or a related field; or equivalent practical experience.

Skills: Proficiency in project management tools (e.g., Jira, Confluence), strong organizational skills, and excellent communication abilities.Knowledge: A basic understanding of system architecture, the software development lifecycle (SDLC), and cloud technologies. Adaptability: Proven ability to work in a remote, fast-paced environment.

Preferred Requirements :Experience in the financial services industry or a highly regulated environment.Familiarity with Agile methodologies and experience with Agile teams.Strong organizational, analytical, and problem-solving skills.Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels.Ability to work effectively in a remote environment, demonstrating leadership and adaptability.

title: Senior Project Manager
descriptionHtml:
This is a remote position.

We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Senior Project Manager to lead NGO projects. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in Digital program management, particularly in the healthcare and technology sectors, with a passion for driving social impact through technological innovations.


We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Senior Project Manager to lead our NGO/iNGO projects. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in program management, particularly in the healthcare or technology sectors, with a passion for driving social impact through technological innovations.


Job Summary:


1. Strategic Planning and Execution:

● Lead the planning, implementation, and tracking of telemedicine projects.

● Develop and maintain detailed project plans to monitor and track progress and ensure that projects align with the organization's strategic goals.

● Manage cross-functional teams to ensure coordinated efforts in program development, execution, and evaluation.


2. Team Leadership and Development:

● Foster a culture of collaboration and innovation within the team, encouraging open communication and idea sharing.

● Conduct regular performance reviews, set professional development goals, and provide mentorship to team members.

● Recruit and onboard new team members, ensuring they align with the organization's mission and values.


3. Stakeholder Engagement:

● Build and maintain relationships with key stakeholders, including external and internal stakeholders

● Regularly communicate program progress and challenges to stakeholders, ensuring transparency and collaborative problem-solving.


4. Budget and Resource Management:

● Oversee the program budget, ensuring efficient allocation and utilization of funds and resources.

● Allocate resources appropriately to ensure project success.


5. Monitoring and Evaluation:

● Implement a comprehensive monitoring and evaluation system to track program progress against goals and objectives.

● Analyze data to identify trends, successes, and areas for improvement, ensuring the program's effectiveness and impact.

● Prepare and present detailed reports on program outcomes and learnings to internal and external stakeholders.


6. Innovation and Continuous Improvement:

● Stay updated with the latest trends and advancements in telehealth and healthcare technology, identifying opportunities for integration into program activities.

● Encourage a culture of innovation within the team, promoting experimentation and the adoption of new approaches.

● Regularly review and update program strategies and processes to enhance efficiency, effectiveness, and impact.




Requirements

Education:
  • Preferred: MPH/MHA/MBA (Health) / MSW or equivalent with experience in Digital Health Program
    Implementation
  • Also considered: MBBS/BDS/BSc Nursing/BAMS/BHMS with strong experience in managing large-scale health
    or social sector programs

Experience:
  • Minimum 6-8 years of clinical experience
  • Experience in Digital Health Interventions
  • Experience in community/public health programs preferred

Skills:
  • Proven track record of managing complex programs with multiple stakeholders.
  • Strong leadership skills and experience in team management.
  • Excellent communication, organizational, and analytical skills.
  • Demonstrated ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.
  • Commitment to Intelehealth’s mission of improving healthcare accessibility.



Benefits

  • Remote working
  • Flexible working hours
  • Great work culture
  • 5 days working
  • Group Medical Insurance

companySlogan: Multi-channel open source Digital Public Good Telemedicine platform for LMICs
companyDescription: Intelehealth is a non-profit delivering high-quality healthcare where there is no doctor via telemedicine. Using our open-source technology platform that's driven by an innovative digital health assistant, we connect patients and frontline health workers at the last mile with doctors, diagnostics & medications. Intelehealth is on track to provide healthcare for 10 million women over the next three years in partnership with Ministries of Health in India & Kyrgyzstan as well as organizations like UNICEF, Jhpiego, MSF, and many more. Intelehealth has been recognized by the World Economic Forum and Niti Aayog India as an impactful Digital Public Good.

title: Digital Engineer
descriptionHtml:
Job Description / Key Responsibilities

  • Collaborate with production, supply chain, quality, planning etc. cross functional teams to gather and document business requirements.
  • Translate business needs into functional and technical specifications for development teams.
  • IT project management with waterfall / agile methodologies.
  • Understanding of SDLC
  • Deal with software vendors and getting system developed.
  • Support the implementation and integration of enterprise systems like SAP, ERP-LN, or other legacy systems.
  • Conduct gap analysis and recommend process improvements or automation opportunities.
  • Develop reports and dashboards to monitor KPIs related to production efficiency, downtime, and quality.
  • Assist in user acceptance testing (UAT), training, and change management activities.
  • Ensure data integrity and compliance with IT and cybersecurity standards.
  • Wireframing and prototyping using various tools to get clear UI/UX experience.

Qualifications And Preferences

  • Bachelor’s degree in IT/CE/Industrial Engineering/Production or related field.
  • 3+ years of experience as a Business Analyst in corporate environment.
  • Understanding of manufacturing processes and systems (e.g., ERP, MES, WMS/Quality systems etc.).
  • Proficiency in tools such as SQL, Excel, Power BI. Python, DevOps etc.
  • Good at analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
  • Ability to work cross-functionally and managing multiple tasks / projects.
  • Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies.
  • Familiarity with CRM, ERP, or other enterprise systems.
  • Experience with Industry 4.0/5.0 technologies (IoT, predictive maintenance, digital twins/RPA/AI-ML etc.).
  • Knowledge Of IT infrastructure and IT security.

-  Translate business needs into functional and technical specifications for development teams.
-  IT project management with waterfall / agile methodologies.
-  Understanding of SDLC
-  Deal with software vendors and getting system developed.
-  Support the implementation and integration of enterprise systems like SAP, ERP-LN, or other legacy systems.
-  Conduct gap analysis and recommend process improvements or automation opportunities.
-  Develop reports and dashboards to monitor KPIs related to production efficiency, downtime, and quality.
-  Assist in user acceptance testing (UAT), training, and change management activities.
-  Ensure data integrity and compliance with IT and cybersecurity standards.
-  Wireframing and prototyping using various tools to get clear UI/UX experience.

Qualifications And Preferences



-  Bachelor’s degree in IT/CE/Industrial Engineering/Production or related field.
-  3+ years of experience as a Business Analyst in corporate environment.
-  Understanding of manufacturing processes and systems (e.g., ERP, MES, WMS/Quality systems etc.).
-  Proficiency in tools such as SQL, Excel, Power BI. Python, DevOps etc.
-  Good at analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
-  Ability to work cross-functionally and managing multiple tasks / projects.
-  Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies.
-  Familiarity with CRM, ERP, or other enterprise systems.
-  Experience with Industry 4.0/5.0 technologies (IoT, predictive maintenance, digital twins/RPA/AI-ML etc.).
-  Knowledge Of IT infrastructure and IT security.
companyDescription:
Larsen & Toubro is an Indian multinational engaged in EPC Projects, Hi-Tech Manufacturing and Services. It operates in over 50 countries worldwide. 

A strong, customer-focused approach and the constant quest for top-class quality have enabled L&T to attain and sustain leadership in its major lines of business for over eight decades.

Corporate Sustainability:
L&T was the first company in India in the engineering & construction space to publicly disclose its sustainability performance.  

Our Integrated Report, which tracks the sustainability performance of the organisation and its inter-connectedness with the financial performance, showcases how L&T is adding value to its stakeholders.

Our technological capabilities enable us to reach various nodes and build a network spanning products, processes, employees, environment and community. This enables a more holistic consideration of actions, outcomes and impact, which in turn accelerates and amplifies returns across all capitals - Financial, Natural, Human, Manufacturing, Intellectual and Social & Relationship.

title: SB-1446-Technical Business Analyst
descriptionHtml:
Technical Business Analyst

Role Summary

Softobiz Technologies is seeking an experienced Technical Business Analyst to drive requirements, governance, and project coordination for enterprise application initiatives delivered for our Australian client base. In this role, you will serve as the primary bridge between business stakeholders, vendors, and engineering teams — translating complex business needs into precise functional and technical specifications that delivery teams can act on. You will own project governance artefacts including RAID logs, status dashboards, and steering committee communications, ensuring full visibility and control throughout the project lifecycle. Your work will directly impact the successful delivery of ERP implementations, platform modernizations, and digital transformation programs across markets in Australia and India.

Key Responsibilities

Business Analysis

  • Conduct requirement gathering workshops with business and technical stakeholders.
  • Prepare and maintain BRDs, FRDs, User Stories, Process Flows, Use Cases, Acceptance Criteria, and Functional Specifications.
  • Translate business requirements into detailed functional and technical requirements for engineering teams.
  • Work closely with Solution Architects, Developers, QA Teams, Vendors, and Business Stakeholders.
  • Manage requirement traceability and scope control throughout the project lifecycle.
  • Support UAT planning, execution, defect triage, and sign-off activities.

Project Management & Governance

  • Own and manage project RAID Logs (Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies).
  • Proactively identify, track, and mitigate project risks and blockers.
  • Coordinate activities across multiple stakeholders, vendors, and internal teams.
  • Prepare and present weekly status reports, project dashboards, and steering committee updates.
  • Manage project schedules, milestones, action registers, and deliverables.
  • Drive follow-ups and ensure closure of open actions and dependencies.
  • Support project planning, estimation, resource coordination, and release management.
  • Ensure adherence to project governance and delivery processes.

Stakeholder & Vendor Management

  • Act as the primary coordination point between Sydney Markets stakeholders, vendors, and delivery teams.
  • Facilitate workshops, meetings, steering committees, and project reviews.
  • Prepare meeting minutes and track action items to closure.
  • Support vendor evaluation, implementation planning, and project delivery governance where required.

Required Technical Skills

Domain Skills & Technologies Must / Preferred Business Analysis BRD, FRD, User Stories, Use Cases, Acceptance Criteria, Functional Specifications, Process Maps Must Project Management RAID Logs, Project Plans, Milestones, Risk Management, Dependency Tracking, Status Reporting Must Delivery Methodologies Agile, Scrum, Waterfall Must Tooling Azure DevOps, Jira, Confluence, Microsoft Project, Visio Must Communication Stakeholder Management, Workshop Facilitation, Steering Committee Presentations, Meeting Minutes Must ERP / Platform Dynamics 365, Business Central, CRM, ERP Implementations, Digital Transformation Preferred Domain Knowledge Property Management, Finance, Tenant Portal, Enterprise Platform Implementations Preferred Technical Concepts APIs, Integrations, Cloud Platforms, Enterprise Architecture Preferred Program Delivery Multi-stream Projects, External Vendor Management, Large-scale Transformation Programs Preferred

Qualifications & Certifications

Education & Experience:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.
  • 6+ years of experience in Business Analysis and Project Management roles (8+ years preferred).
  • Strong track record in enterprise application projects — ERP implementations, digital transformation, or platform modernization.
  • Demonstrated experience managing RAID logs, project plans, stakeholder communications, risks, and dependencies.
  • Experience working with Agile, Scrum, and Waterfall delivery methodologies.
  • Experience working with external vendors and managing multi-stream delivery programs.

Preferred Certifications

  • CBAP (Certified Business Analysis Professional) or equivalent BA certification.
  • PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent project management certification.
  • Microsoft Dynamics 365 Functional Consultant certification.
  • PMI-ACP or SAFe Agile certification.

Soft Skills & Cultural Fit

  • Ability to lead client-facing workshops and steering committee sessions with senior Australian enterprise stakeholders, including C-level audiences.
  • Comfortable working independently across IST and AEST time zones with minimal supervision, managing ambiguity in complex, multi-vendor environments.
  • Strong written and verbal communication for executive-level documentation, reports, and presentations.
  • High ownership mindset — proactively drives actions to closure without needing to be followed up.
  • Collaborative team player who can align diverse stakeholder groups and build consensus across business and technical functions.

What We Offer

  • Direct exposure to large-scale enterprise digital transformation programs for tier-1 Australian clients.
  • Collaborative work environment with access to experienced Solution Architects, Delivery Managers, and cross-functional engineering teams.
  • Competitive compensation aligned to market standards, with performance-linked growth.
  • Professional development support including certifications, training programs, and mentorship.
  • Hybrid working model with flexibility across India (Mohali) and virtual engagement with Australian clients.

About Softobiz Technologies

Softobiz Technologies is a technology and product services company headquartered in India, operating Global Capability Centers (GCCs) for leading international clients across healthcare, fintech, and enterprise software. Our GCC model enables world-class talent in India to work directly within the product and engineering teams of our global partners, contributing meaningfully to product strategy, growth, and operations

Innovation begins with like-minded people aiming to transform the world together. At Softobiz, we invite you to become a part of an organization that has been helping clients transform their business by fusing insights, creativity, and technology. With a team of 400+ technology enthusiasts, we have been trusted by leading enterprises around the globe for over 18+ years.

At Softobiz, we foster a culture of equality, learning, collaboration, and creative freedom, empowering our employees to grow and excel in their careers. Our technical craftsmen are pioneers in the latest technologies like AI, machine learning, and product development.

Why Should You Join Softobiz?

  • Work with technical craftsmen who are pioneers in the latest technologies.
  • Access training sessions and skill-enhancement courses for personal and professional growth.
  • Be rewarded for exceptional performance and celebrate success through engaging parties.
  • Experience a culture that embraces diversity and creates an inclusive environment for all employees.

Softobiz is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. All qualified applicants will be afforded equal employment opportunities without discrimination based on race, creed, color, national origin, sex, age, disability, or marital status.

companySlogan: Start with an idea and we do the rest!
companyDescription:
We help enterprises build AI-first engineering systems where capability compounds. 

At Softobiz, we partner with organisations modernising platforms, adopting AI across the development lifecycle, and setting up Global Capability Centres (GCCs) in India. Our focus is building engineering capability that strengthens over time. 

Our core capabilities include: 

🤖 AI-first product engineering and application development
☁️ Platform modernisation and cloud transformation
🌏 Global Capability Centre (GCC) setup and scaling in India
🔄 Data engineering, automation, and intelligent workflows

Most engineering partners optimise for speed or cost. We focus on how systems and teams hold up over time.

That means: 
🔁 Systems where decisions and context are carried forward, not restarted with every project
🤝 Teams that build ownership, not just execute tasks
📊 Engineering that compounds in value, not effort 

We work as an extension of your core team, starting by mapping how your systems operate today and where capability is getting lost as you scale.

title: Technology Business Management Analyst, Aravo
descriptionHtml:
Ralph Lauren Corporation (NYSE:RL) is a global leader in the design, marketing and distribution of premium lifestyle products in five categories: apparel, accessories, home, fragrances, and hospitality. For more than 50 years, Ralph Lauren's reputation and distinctive image have been consistently developed across an expanding number of products, brands and international markets. The Company's brand names, which include Ralph Lauren, Ralph Lauren Collection, Ralph Lauren Purple Label, Polo Ralph Lauren, Double RL, Lauren Ralph Lauren, Polo Ralph Lauren Children, Chaps, among others, constitute one of the world's most widely recognized families of consumer brands.

At Ralph Lauren, we unite and inspire the communities within our company as well as those in which we serve by amplifying voices and perspectives to create a culture of belonging, ensuring inclusion, and fairness for all. We foster a culture of inclusion through: Talent, Education & Communication, Employee Groups and Celebration.

,

This role will be working in partnership with other technical resources as well business partner in NA & ASIA. He/she will be responsible for designing, developing and implementing Vendor Onboarding process and its integration to ECC & various systems along with day to day support activities. As a Ralph Lauren application support Analyst, you will be a part of a growing community that is Global in scope and operates across all of Ralph Lauren’s regions & application disciplines.

  • Translates business requirements into detailed functional specifications, test scripts, and other system documentation while adhering to company standards
  • Works as a Subject Matter Expert with the user community, development team and other team members on IT projects.
  • Researches, analyzes, designs, identifies, and facilitates process improvements that focus on providing standard application functionality to meet business requirements wherever possible.
  • Assisting with project planning to ensuring reliability, efficiency, and cost effectiveness of business solutions.
  • Conducting testing of new business solutions.
  • Identifies costs, benefits, risks, and alternatives in proposed system designs and their impact on the integration with other systems and SAP modules.
  • Act as direct liaison between Business and technical teams to ensure system requirements, deadlines and priorities are clear and attained
  • Perform technical trouble shooting to resolve production support issues and propose optimal resolutions.

,

Technical Skills

  • Worked as application support analyst for any cloud, Supplier chain or any inhouse application.
  • Hand-on configuration experience with cloud, Supply chain tool or any inhouse solutions.
  • Worked in application support model in various phases: implementation/ installation, support, analysis, Configuration, suggesting improvements and maintenance of software applications to streamline business operations
  • C++/Java/JavaScript Programming background is preferred.
  • Identify process improvements opportunities across multiple lines of business
  • Analyze and document current business processes and gather business requirements from subject matter experts.
  • Experience working with stakeholders around the world in different time zones
  • Identifies costs, benefits, risks, and alternatives in proposed system designs and their impact on the integration with other systems
  • Troubleshoots application problems and proposes optimal resolutions

Act as direct liaison with various troubleshooting, business process mapping and related system enhancements.

,

Professional Skills

  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills
  • Must have proven ability to support multiple projects on an aggressive timeline
  • Must have “can do” attitude and be able to work independently
  • Strong time management skills
  • Ability to multi-task and prioritize activities on assigned tasks.
  • Ability and willingness to learn
  • Serve as a primary technical point of contact to discuss new requirements and provide knowledge of development environments and processes

Experience

Minimum of 2-3 years of IT Experience

Experience with Aravo/Vendor on-boarding tool, supply chain tool , Docusign- contract management is desirable

What You Bring (Qualifications)

  • Bachelor’s degree with 2-3 or more years of work experience and demonstrated capability to perform job responsibilities through previous experience and education
  • Excellent communication (both written & verbal), presentation and business relationship skills
  • Experience with working with business partners across the globe desired

title: Deputy Manager - Service Delivery
descriptionHtml:
• Designation: Deputy Manager - Service Delivery
  • Reporting to: AVP - Operations and Marketing
  • Location: Mahape, Navi Mumbai
  • Educational Qualification: BE/B.Tech/MBA
  • Work Experience (yrs.): 5-8 years of relevant experience
  • Working Days: 5 day working


I. Key Results and Activities


#1 Provide Deputation and full kitting support for projects to ensure Business revenue targets are met, ensure zero rework, zero delays and high Customer Delight on every job.


  • Improve site planning by conducting detailed briefings in advance, excluding urgent/same-day deputations.
  • Execute jobs within the estimated mandays without manpower overruns for lumpsum jobs, ensuring a 95% gross margin.
  • Overview on Briefing and Debriefing with team and maintain QVC
  • Ensure on-time delivery, achieving 90%+ Order to Job Completion rate.
  • Timely scope assessment, manpower estimation, and use of barcharts for core engine services.
  • Ensure full kitting support incl manpower deputation, tool kit readiness, Briefing , debriefing, Site support, Customer support, Post site feedbacks and improvements.
  • Daily touch base with the site team and solve their queries related to hygiene, passes, documentation, minor technical queries etc.
  • Submit Analysis report for any gaps for all the contracts for continual improvements.
  • Update Project Master service planning report with the completion of the projects and sanitize the report created by Asst Manager


#2 Drive Continual Improvement in Delivery to reduce time by ¼ to ½ day every site compared to the Bar Chart.


  • Work on corrective actions from past learnings, site debrief and customer interactions so that “Quick Service” can become a competitive advantage.
  • Build capability through upgradation, adoption and training of technology and addition of tools such as Condition Monitoring Systems.
  • Implement and monitor safety practices in the workshop and on-site, providing necessary training and briefings, while tracking safety performance for continuous improvement.
  • Reduce rework and rejections to <2% of executed contracts (Spares and Services).
  • Achieve zero reported safety violations at site and workshop executions.
  • Maintain Customer Delight score >4.5 across all service contracts.
  • Continual improvement through site debriefs and customer feedback.
  • Ensure compliance with health and safety standards by implementing safe practices, conducting safety briefings/debriefings, and monitoring sites for safety breaches.


#3 Build Capability, Develop People and Plan for Succession


  1. Continuously update the Service Team’s skill matrix through regular reviews and feedback-driven trainings, internally and with designated institutes..
  2. Ensure Service Team skill matrix is constantly updated by continual review and site feedback based trainings arranged internally and along with institutes designated.


II. Knowledge/Skills/Behaviours - Must Have (M)/ Nice to Have(N)


A. Knowledge (Functional and Non-Technical):

  • At Least 5-8 years of relevant Experience in service industry with team deputation or coordination as a core function and handling multiple sites / project on any given day.(M)
  • Team deputation to Foreign sites (over 50 deputation - awareness of the importance of insurance; VISA, foreign currency; arranging accommodation;time difference etc) (M)
  • Good understanding of internalising the Procedures; Review and analysing the Service POs; foreseeing the possible threats to Velocity and Cost(M)
  • 4-5 years of work experience in a fast paced industry such as Marine, Ship Repair, Oil & Gas Drilling(N)
  • Knowledge of propulsion systems (N)
  • Knowledge of taxation - GST; basic accounting.(N)


B. Skills (Functional and Non-Technical):

  • Good Communication in verbal and written English to be able to communicate information clearly.(M)
  • Attention to detail so that getting information, Documents, people pulse and channelisation can be done seamlessly. (M)
  • Setting, managing and executing priorities of the team based on Organisational goals (N)


C. Behaviours (Technical and Non-Technical):

  • Mindset to dive deep into problems, find solutions and implement them (M)
  • Mindset of learning, continual improvement and delivering excellence(M)
  • Interest in emerging technologies and trends in engineering, O&M and related industries.(N)

jobFunction: Project Management, Customer Service, and Strategy/Planning
industries: Shipbuilding, Engineering Services, and Boilers, Tanks, and Shipping Container Manufacturing
companySlogan: Engine and Propulsion System Reliability Expert
companyDescription:
Spare parts and maintenance services for 4-stroke high-speed and medium-speed engines as well as propulsion systems & reliability solutions for all types of 2/4 Stroke, Inline/V Type, Diesel, Natural Gas, & Petrol Engines with up to 30 Cylinders.

With 3 decades of global experience, Neptunus Power Plant Service Pvt. ltd specializes in engine and propulsion system maintenance, guided by our core mission to "Change the Way Maintenance Is Done in the Industry!" and integrating cutting-edge technology.

Industries We Serve :
Marine | Oil & Gas | Industrial Defence

Our Solution:
1. Engine Condition Monitoring System (ECMS)
Class-certified (ABS, IR) technology employs 2 non-invasive sensors to pinpoint emerging engine defects & measure peak pressures in real time, enabling online health monitoring.

2. TorqueSense & ShaPoLi
Shaft agnostic solution with 2 non-invasive sensors accurately measures torque & power online (+-1 Accuracy level, No Strain gauges or Slip Ring). Further, upgrade it with ShaPoLi to comply with EEXI & CII regulations by IMO

3. Oil Quality Management Solution (OQMS)
Continuous oil cleaning with kidney-loop depth filtration & monitoring oil quality changes in real time. 

4. Engine & Propulsion System Maintenance Service & Spare Parts
Maintenance services for all 4-stroke high-speed & medium-speed engines & propulsion systems. We focus on quality work while optimising the scope of maintenance With 2000+ projects completed, we are supported by riding squads for on-site assistance.

Service: Niigata (OEM authorised)| EMD (OEM authorised) | CAT| MAN | Wartsila | Yanmar | MTU Kawasaki | Nakashima | Berg | Daihatsu | Bergen |Schottel |Kamome 

Spare Parts: Niigata (OEM authorised) | EMD (OEM authorised) | CAT |  Kamome | Yanmar | Wartsila| MAN 

Assets: Engines, Gensets, Auxiliary Engines, & Propulsion Systems (CPP/FPP- Propellers, Clutch, Gearbox, Bow-Thrusters )

title: Technical Program Manager, Geo Data Operations
descriptionHtml:
Minimum qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree in Engineering, or other related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
  • 1 year of experience in program management.

Preferred qualifications:

  • Certification in Agile, PMP, and other related program management.
  • Experience in mapping technologies or mapping operations.
  • Experience in data management with data analytics skills.
  • Ability to be an influential member of a highly integrated team composed of both technical and non-technical members.
  • Strong technical and business acumen with an ability to solve data and operational problems with machine learning and artificial intelligence technologies.
  • Strong project/program management skills.

About The Job

A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.

The Geo team is focused on building the most accurate, comprehensive, and useful maps for our users, through products like Maps, Earth, Street View, Google Maps Platform, and more. Every month, more than a billion people rely on Maps services to explore the world and navigate their daily lives.

The Geo team also enables developers to use the power of Google Maps platforms to enhance their apps and websites. As they plot a course for the future of mapping, they are solving complex computer science problems, designing beautiful and intuitive product experiences, and improving our understanding of the real world.

Responsibilities

  • Execute operations for multiple programs and work streams reaching beyond your immediate team and organization to deliver business, operational, and technical improvements.
  • Strategize, plan, and prioritize objectives and success criteria across your projects, ensuring schedules and dependencies are aligned.
  • Measure and publish program and process metrics to drive consensus in teams understanding of issues and to drive continuous improvement for the larger organization.
  • Identify and implement technical and business programs and processes in medium to large work groups, leveraging AI/ML technologies where applicable to drive improvements.


Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

title: Technical Program Manager, Search Platform
descriptionHtml:
Minimum qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
  • 5 years of experience in technical program management leading cross-functional software infrastructure projects.
  • Experience developing data-driven communications and reporting.
  • Experience managing system architectures and facilitating decisions based on technical discussions with engineering teams.

Preferred qualifications:

  • 5 years of experience managing cross-functional or cross-team projects.
  • Experience in continuous integration, developer facing, and capacity management.

About The Job

A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.

In Google Search, we're reimagining what it means to search for information – any way and anywhere. To do that, we need to solve complex engineering challenges and expand our infrastructure, while maintaining a universally accessible and useful experience that people around the world rely on. In joining the Search team, you'll have an opportunity to make an impact on billions of people globally.

Responsibilities

  • Develop and manage end-to-end program management governance (e.g., charters, comprehensive project plans, risk registers, and stakeholder communication strategies) for multiple medium-to-large technical initiatives.
  • Lead the execution of strategic roadmaps. Drive technical projects from requirements through launch, keeping complex schedules aligned and removing roadblocks.
  • Work with leadership to transform the effectiveness of the organization. Create processes, frameworks, and productivity metrics to constantly raise the execution bar and simplify complex developer workflows.
  • Partner closely with engineering directors, principal architects, product managers, and other Technical Program Manager (TPM) groups across Search, and Gemini teams to streamline execution, manage Objectives and Key Results (OKRs), and land platform integrations on time.
  • Analyze program, latency, and process metrics to build actionable insights and dashboards that drive engineering decisions and continuous improvement.


Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .
